# GitHub repository About (reference)

Keep this file in sync when updating the repo **About** section on GitHub.

## Description (≤350 characters)

30 Agent Skills for deterministic USA compliance auditing of AI agents — HIPAA, NIST AI RMF, FERPA, COPPA, PCI-DSS, SOC 2, FedRAMP, CMMC, GLBA, privacy & GDPR. Presidio PHI redaction, MCP templates, Pydantic AI, VS Code & JetBrains plugins.

## Update via CLI

```bash
gh repo edit vaquarkhan/compliance-agent-skills \
  --description "30 Agent Skills for deterministic USA compliance auditing of AI agents — HIPAA, NIST AI RMF, FERPA, COPPA, PCI-DSS, SOC 2, FedRAMP, CMMC, GLBA, privacy & GDPR. Presidio PHI redaction, MCP templates, Pydantic AI, VS Code & JetBrains plugins." \
  --homepage "https://github.com/vaquarkhan/compliance-agent-skills#readme"
```
